news_items.headline: California bets on an obscure tool to replace clean air authority Trump revoked
news_items.description: The rules would hold pollution magnets like warehouses, ports and railyards accountable for the trucks and ships they attract.

news_items.headline: Cuba Says Its Military Is Prepared as Trump’s Threats Multiply
news_items.description: A senior Cuban official said the country is preparing for a possible military assault as President Donald Trump increases economic pressure on the government in Havana and suggests it could be the next US target after Venezuela and Iran.

news_items.headline: From Iran to Cuba, Trump’s Sanctions Have Hurt People More Than Governments
news_items.description: The US says “sanctions” are about regime change, but in practice they are economic warfare against entire populations.

news_items.headline: 10 Rising AI-Related Jobs Transforming Australia's Workforce in 2026
news_items.description: Artificial intelligence is reshaping Australia's job market at an unprecedented pace, with technical and strategic AI roles leading the charge as the fastest-growing opportunities in 2026.

news_items.headline: Bitcoin Drops Below $69,000 as War Fears Weigh on Crypto Markets
news_items.description: Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies declined anew as the US, Israel and Iran traded fresh threats and attacks.
